ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (article:Article {articleId: 123})-[:FROM_DEPARTMENT]->(department:Department {departmentNo: 101}),
    p2 = (article)-[:VARIANT_OF]->(product:Product {productCode: 456}),
    p3 = (article)-[:CUSTOMERS_ALSO_LIKE]->(similarArticle:Article {articleId: 789})
RETURN p1, p2, p3
ground.question: What department and product family does article ID 123 belong to, and how does its color and design compare to the most frequently purchased variant of article ID 789?

cypher:
MATCH (a1:Article {articleId: 123})-[:FROM_DEPARTMENT]->(d:Department),       (a2:Article {articleId: 789})-[:VARIANT_OF]->(p:Product),       (a1)-[:VARIANT_OF]->(p2:Product)
WITH d, p, a1.colourGroupName AS colourGroupName, a1.graphicalAppearanceName AS graphicalAppearanceName,       a2.colourGroupName AS mostFrequentColourGroupName, a2.graphicalAppearanceName AS mostFrequentGraphicalAppearanceName
WHERE colourGroupName = mostFrequentColourGroupName AND graphicalAppearanceName = mostFrequentGraphicalAppearanceName
RETURN d.departmentName, p.productGroupName
